channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: ⚽ 'Ted Lasso' actor Cristo Fernández debuts in USL...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Fernández, a forward like Rojas, was subbed on in the 79th minute of El Paso's USL Cup match against New Mexico United on Saturday night.

item.title: A-List: FIFA's top-4 make WC semis for first time
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina, Spain, France and England went into the tournament as the top four in FIFA's rankings and are two wins away from being crowned champions again.

item.title: Sources: FIFA, FIFPRO in talks over heat protocol ...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: FIFA and global players' union FIFPRO are in discussions over establishing protocols to avoid games being played in excessive heat, sources have told ESPN.

item.title: Haaland Sr: Norway 'robbed' in QF, 'well done ref'...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Alf-Inge Haaland claims Norway were "robbed" in their World Cup quarterfinal but hopes England go on to win the tournament after knocking out his homeland.

item.title: Norway boss fumes at 'clear' TV wire goal assist
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Norway boss Stale Solbakken has said he believes the overhead wires deserve an assist for England's equaliser.

item.title: Copy of Embolo red-carded for diving after VAR review
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Switzerland forward Breel Embolo was sent off in the second half of a World Cup quarterfinal match with Argentina on Saturday night after a video review showed he was guilty of simulation.

item.title: Bellingham backs England stars after Tuchel fury
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Jude Bellingham praised England's fighting spirit and ability to "win dirty" after coach Thomas Tuchel criticized their performance in beating Norway on Saturday.

item.title: Sources: Chelsea prioritise exit for Garnacho
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Chelsea are demanding €50 million ($57m) for Alejandro Garnacho after the winger did not report back to the club for preseason training, sources have told ESPN.

item.title: Messi praises 'not normal' Argentina in WC defense...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Lionel Messi has said Argentina's remarkable run of success is "not normal" after the reigning world champions beat Switzerland to reach the World Cup semifinals, where they will face England.

item.title: Poor Treatment Of Nigerians Abroad Worrisome, Makinde Tells FG
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The presidential candidate of the Allied Peoples Movement (APM) the governor of Oyo State Seyi Makinde has urged the Federal Government to take stronger diplomatic measures to protect Nigerians living abroad, describing reports of the poor treatment of citizens, particularly in South Africa, as dist

item.title: Ekiti monarchs laud Tinubu over rescue of Oyo pupils, teachers
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The traditional rulers said the operation demonstrated that Nigeria possesses the military capability, intelligence assets, and operational expertise required to... The post Ekiti monarchs laud Tinubu over rescue of Oyo pupils, teachers appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Dangote cracks down on illegal haulage, offers N500,000 reward for whistleblowers
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The company warned that any Dangote truck found transporting unauthorized goods would be treated as involved in illegal haulage activities, adding that both the drivers and the owners of such goods risk arrest, confiscation of the cargo, and prosecution under applicable laws. The post Dangote cracks

item.title: Matawalle Condoles Former Deputy, Nasiha, Over Wife’s Death
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Minister of State for Defence, Bello Matawalle, has paid a condolence visit to former Zamfara Deputy Governor, Senator Hassan Nasiha, following the death of his wife, Hajiya Kulu. The post Matawalle Condoles Former Deputy, Nasiha, Over Wife’s Death appeared first on Trending News.

item.title: Nigeria Strike Gold With 14-Medal Haul At Uganda Para Badminton International
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s para badminton team delivered an outstanding performance at the 2026 Uganda Para Badminton International Championship, returning home with an impressive haul of 14 medals, comprising nine gold and five silver. The championship, held in Uganda from 7 to 12 July, further cemented Nigeria’s g

item.title: Official: Ex-Portuguese champions Braga sign Nigerian youngster
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: ​Portuguese side SC Braga has officially confirmed the signing of young Nigerian defender Adebisi Olamikun from Inter Lagos, Soccernet.ng reports. ​In recent years, Inter Lagos has consistently produced top-tier talent, successfully facilitating their transition to European clubs for further profess

item.title: Police Launch Manhunt For Bus Driver, Conductor Over Alleged Assault On Officers In Enugu
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The state commissioner of police urged the driver and conductor to surrender themselves for investigation, warning that all lawful measures were being deployed to apprehend them. The post Police Launch Manhunt For Bus Driver, Conductor Over Alleged Assault On Officers In Enugu appeared first on Chan

item.title: 2030 World Cup: FIFA mulls 64- team format
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: South American nations Uruguay, Argentina and Paraguay will each host an opening match. The rest of the tournament will be played in Morocco, Portugal and Spain.

item.title: Wealth acquired without honour is fleeting — David Mark
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The National Chairman of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Senator David Mark, has advised graduating students to place integrity above money and quick success, saying “wealth acquired without honour is fleeting.” Senator Mark gave the advice on Sunday at the 2026 Graduation, Speech and Prize-G

item.title: Gov Bala, APM Leaders Advocate Collaboration, Issue-Based Politics
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Bauchi State Governor, Bala Mohammed, and leaders of the Allied Peoples Movement (APM) have emphasised the need for collaboration among political leaders and issue-based campaigns as Nigeria prepares for future elections. Speaking while receiving his Oyo State counterpart, Governor Seyi Makinde, in

item.title: Zamfara Unveils $200m Lithium Plant, Targets Jobs, Value Addition
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Governor Dauda Lawal has commissioned a $200 million lithium mining and processing plant in Zamfara State, declaring that the state's future prosperity depends on responsible management of its vast mineral resources, local value addition and job creation. The post Zamfara Unveils $200m Lithium Plant

item.title: Senator Nwoko’s Bold Prediction: Will The Super Eagles Shock The World In 2030?
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: A bold statement from Senator Ned Nwoko has sparked fresh debate about the future of Nigerian football. According to the senator, the Super Eagles can emulate the remarkable progress made by Morocco and other ambitious football nations to become a force at the 2030 FIFA World Cup. Related: Can Niger

item.title: Troops Kill ISWAP Cameraman In Borno, Recover Footage Of Terrorist Activities
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: An analysis of a video recorded before the attack showed that it was "coordinated by four senior ISWAP commanders (Qai'ds) alongside three foreign terrorist facilitators". The post Troops Kill ISWAP Cameraman In Borno, Recover Footage Of Terrorist Activities appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Haaland Proud Of Norway’s World Cup Breakthrough Despite Quarter-final Exit
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Erling Haaland believes Norway’s impressive FIFA World Cup campaign has transformed the nation’s footballing reputation despite their quarter-final exit at the hands of England. Norway’s dream run came to an end on Saturday after a 2-1 extra-time defeat, with England midfielder Jude Bellingham scori

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Stakeholders in the health sector have called for urgent reforms in Nigeria’s health financing system, warning that inadequate funding, poor budget implementation and weak accountability continue to drive the country’s high maternal mortality rate. The call was made during a performance

item.title: FIFA Clarifies Tiebreaker As Mbappe Edges Messi In Golden Boot Race
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: With the 2026 World Cup Semi-Finals just days away, FIFA has officially weighed in on the tightening race for the tournament’s Golden Boot, clarifying that Kylian Mbappe currently holds a narrow advantage over Lionel Messi—despite both superstars sitting level on goals. In a statement released Sunda

item.title: UN Envoy, Ibrahim Seeks Global Debt-For-Education Swap At UNESCO Conference
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Nigeria's Permanent Representative to the United Nations, Ambassador Jimoh Ibrahim , has called for a bold global debt-for-education swap initiative to enable developing countries invest more in education without undermining their debt obligations. item.title: INEC Portal: APC mocks opposition over deadline extension for uploading candidates’ names
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The APC says that though INEC acted within its statutory powers and administrative discretion, the circumstances that led to the extension exposed the organisational shortcomings of the opposition parties and their capacity to govern. item.title: Qatar’s former emir remembered as ‘a man of vision and courage’

item.description: Firefighters arrived at the scene to find patrons running through blasting flames to escape.

item.title: Nwabali Completes Stunning Return To Chippa United
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: South African Premiership club Chippa United have confirmed the re-signing of Nigerian international goalkeeper Stanley Nwabali, just months after his departure from the Eastern Cape side. Nwabali left the Chilli Boys in February after requesting the termination of his contract, with hopes of securi

item.title: FG raids illegal gold camp in Osun, arrests two suspects
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Officials recovered two motorcycles, pumping machines, Lister generators, mineral washing equipment, long hose pipes, gold-trapping carpets, cutlasses and other tools believed to have been used in the illegal mining activities. The operational camp was dismantled and the site sealed in line with the

item.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Lorde was performing at the Real Cool Festival in Madrid on Thursday and took some time during her set to speak out against AI glasses. While she didn't specify any brands in particular, it's likely she was taking a shot at festival sponsor Ray-Ban, which has collaborated with Meta on a pair of AI s

item.title: Former Spain PM criticised for ‘xenophobic’ remark on French World Cup team
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Mariano Rajoy condemned for opinion piece on Spanish website El Debate ahead of World Cup semifinal.

item.title: ‘Exceptional individuals like Soyinka do not come often in generation’ – Tinubu
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has paid tribute to Nobel laureate Prof. Wole Soyinka on his 92nd birthday, describing him as an exceptional figure whose contributions to literature, democracy and good governance have left a lasting impact on Nigeria and the world. In a birthday message released on Sunday ahe

item.title: Sinner Defeats Zverev In 4 Sets To Retain Wimbledon Men’s Singles Title
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Jannik Sinner cemented his status as the world’s premier tennis player on Sunday, overcoming a determined Alexander Zverev in four sets to successfully defend his Wimbledon men’s singles title at the All England Club. The Italian top seed rallied from a first-set loss to secure a 6-7 (7-

item.title: Sinner Beats Zverev To Retain Wimbledon Title
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Italian tennis star Jannik Sinner successfully defended his Wimbledon title on Sunday, defeating Alexander Zverev 6-7, 7-6, 6-3, 6-4. The world No. 1 secured his second consecutive Wimbledon crown and the fifth Grand Slam of his career after a thrilling and hard-fought marathon match lasting three h

item.title: Sinner grinds down Zverev to successfully defend Wimbledon title
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Jannik Sinner successfully defended his Wimbledon title with a four-set victory against French Open champion Alexander Zverev on Centre Court.

item.title: Oriire 44 and our double standard, By Festus Adedayo
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Friday’s announcement of the release of the Oriire captives sent Nigerians into a state of collective rejoicing. It beautifully confirmed the universality-of-griefs thesis: that whether in Nchatancha in Enugu, Kaura Namoda in Zamfara, or Ilu-Abo in Ondo State, our shared humanity possesses a single

item.title: Mystery as 3,000-year-old tomb is unearthed in Egypt
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: It contains an open courtyard leading to a rock-cut chapel shaped like an inverted “T”, with burial chambers carved beneath the ground.

The Super Eagles' shot-stopper left the South African club in February 2026, in what both parties described as a mutual agreement. item.title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz indefinitely
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards say they have closed the Strait of Hormuz indefinitely after firing warning shots at a commercial ship they accused of using an unauthorised shipping route. According to Iran’s state news agency, IRNA, the ship ignored several warnings to use an approved shipping lane bef

item.title: History beckons as best four teams in the world march into World Cup semi-finals
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: For the first time in World Cup history, the four highest-ranked teams in FIFA's rankings have all reached the semi-finals, creating a blockbuster finale to the 2026 tournament.

item.title: Kim ends 1,001-day wait for win as Fitzpatrick, MacIntyre fall short in Scotland
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Tom Kim ended his 1,001-day wait for a fourth PGA Tour title by closing out an impressive two-shot win at the Genesis Scottish Open, as Robert MacIntyre missed out on a home victory.

item.title: FIFA Eyes 64-Team World Cup Ahead 2030 Tournament
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino has revealed that world football’s governing body will consider expanding the FIFA World Cup from 48 to 64 teams before the 2030 edition. The proposal comes after the successful introduction of the expanded 48-team format at the 2026 World Cup, which increased the num

item.title: Nigeria’s Crude Output Meets 104% of OPEC Quota Averages 1.56mbpd in June
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s crude oil and condensate production soared to an average of 1,735,398 barrels per day in the month of June 2026, representing positive growth for a 4th consecutive month, the NUPRC said in its Crude Oil and Condensate Production 2026, report released on Sunday.   In the month under re

He stated that utilizing spiritual intelligence, communal oath-taking, and localized intelligence networks will work al

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Borno State Governor, Professor Babagana Zulum, has announced automatic employment for 17 volunteer Nurses serving at the General Hospital, Biu, assuring that more medical personnel would be recruited to strengthen healthcare delivery in the area. The development was disclosed in a post accompanied by a video shared on X by security analyst Bakatsine on Sunday. “Nigeria

item.title: Police set to arraign Adeniyi Adeyemi on Tuesday over alleged fake PFIPC scheme
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force is set to arraign Adeniyi Adeyemi, the self-acclaimed Director-General of the alleged Presidential Foreign interv... The post Police set to arraign Adeniyi Adeyemi on Tuesday over alleged fake PFIPC scheme appeared first on Nairametrics.

item.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed as US insists key shipping route remains open
item.dc:creator: Ripples Nigeria
item.description: Tensions between Iran and the United States escalated sharply on Sunday after Tehran announced the closure of the strategic Strait of Hormuz, while Washington rejected the claim, insisting that commercial shipping continued to move freely through the vital international waterway. The latest dispute

item.title: Globacom Rewards 115 Top Dealers with Cash, Cars at 2026 Partners’ Gala
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Nigeria’s foremost digital solutions provider, Globacom, has reaffirmed its enduring commitment to rewarding excellence, loyalty and strategic partnership by honouring 115 of its highest-performing business partners with millions of Naira

item.title: Umahi inspects Calabar-Ebonyi-Benue-Kogi-Nasarawa-Abuja road
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Minister of Works, Senator David Umahi, has said the ongoing Calabar–Ebonyi–Benue–Kogi–Nasarawa–Abuja Superhighway will reduce travel time between Ebonyi State and Abuja to about three hours upon completion. Umahi stated this on Sunday while inspecting construction works at Kilometre 118 of Sect

item.title: Anti-migrant display set alight in Northern Ireland bonfire
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The flags of Palestine, Syria, Sudan and Somalia were draped over a huge bonfire tower before it was set alight.

item.title: Friends turned foes: The split reshaping Senegal
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Ousmane Sonko reveals what ended his political partnership with the president, sparking a constitutional standoff.

item.title: Lagos lawyer to spend 7 months behind bars over illegal waste disposal
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: The Lagos State Special Offences (Mobile) Court sitting at Bolade, Oshodi, has sentenced one Taiwo Abidemi, a 67-year-old legal practitioner read more Lagos lawyer to spend 7 months behind bars over illegal waste disposal

item.title: Infantino opens door to 64-team World Cup
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Plans for a 64-team men's world cup are set to be picked up and assessed in detail after the 2026 tournament with Fifa boss Gianni Infantino saying football needs to be "for the whole world".

item.title: Jannik Sinner beats Alexander Zverev to win second straight Wimbledon title
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Italy's Jannik Sinner won his second consecutive title after his German opponent appeared bothered by a knee issue following a slip to the grass at a key point in the third set. Sinner's fifth Grand Slam title came in his first tournament since a second-round meltdown at the French Open, when he wil

item.title: Elon Musk roasts OpenAI's Apple lawsuit — but Altman hits back: 'You're the one selling investors on space datacenters'
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance
